_metadata.taxonomy_description: Hierarchical taxonomy of cyber-manipulation attack vectors targeting the belief- and opinion-formation pipeline of political information consumers. Each leaf is an operationalised technique mapped to a distinct psychological exploitation pathway; families group techniques by primary delivery/exploitation mechanism. Used by the research pipeline to drive platform-native attack generation and downstream effectivity analysis.

family_descriptions.Social_Media_Misinformation: Information manipulation through false, misleading, or decontextualized content designed to alter cognitive framing of issues. Targets System-2 reasoning shortcuts under information overload.
family_descriptions.Coordinated_Amplification: Social-proof manipulation through artificial volume, simulated consensus, and platform gaming to create false impressions of grassroots support or opposition.
family_descriptions.Manipulative_Persuasion: Direct psychological influence through emotional appeals, identity activation, authority exploitation, and urgency cues targeting heuristic/affective processing.
family_descriptions.Synthetic_Media_Generation: Attacks leveraging generative AI (audio, video, image, text) to produce content indistinguishable from authentic sources, exploiting the authenticity heuristic and personalising manipulative messages at scale.

Misleading_Narrative_Framing.description: Constructs a misleading narrative around a real event or policy to alter interpretation through selective emphasis, omission, and reframing.

Fabricated_Statistic_Claim.description: Presents fabricated or heavily distorted statistics from a plausible-sounding source to lend false empirical weight to a position.

Out_of_Context_Visual_Reframing.description: Repurposes authentic images or video in a misleading context to evoke an emotional response or support a false narrative.

Selective_Historical_Analogy.description: Anchors a current policy debate to a selectively chosen historical episode (WWII appeasement, Cold War brinkmanship, post-9/11 overreach) to force a pre-loaded conclusion without engaging present-case specifics.

Strawman_Quote_Fabrication.description: Attributes a deliberately extreme or incoherent quote to a named political figure or institution to seed contempt and foreclose deliberation.

Bot_Like_Repetition_Burst.description: Floods a topic with repetitive, slightly varied messages to exploit the illusory truth effect and simulate widespread agreement.

Hashtag_Flooding_Campaign.description: Coordinates rapid, high-volume hashtag use to hijack trending algorithms and amplify narrative visibility.

Astroturf_Comment_Wave.description: Deploys coordinated, human-like comments under news articles that simulate organic grassroots opinion, exploiting conformity bias.

Review_Bombing_Cascade.description: Coordinated one-star or one-dimensional reviews against an institution, publication, or app to manufacture a reputational cliff and signal supposed public rejection.

Cross_Platform_Narrative_Laundering.description: Seeds a fabricated claim on low-credibility fringe platforms (imageboards, Telegram), launders it through intermediary aggregators, then surfaces it in mainstream feeds with the fringe origin stripped — exploiting the consumer's inability to trace provenance.

Fear_Appeal_Scapegoating_Post.description: Combines vivid threat imagery with outgroup blame attribution, leveraging fear-driven heuristic processing to bypass analytical evaluation.

Ingroup_Outgroup_Identity_Priming.description: Frames an issue in us-versus-them terms to activate social identity threat, increasing polarization and resistance to compromise.

Pseudo_Expert_Authority_Cue.description: Attributes a misleading claim to a fabricated or misrepresented expert source, exploiting the authority heuristic for perceived credibility.

False_Flag_Accusation.description: Publicly reframes a documented adversary action as a self-inflicted 'false flag', inverting attribution and seeding distrust of the reporting apparatus and affected institutions.

Urgency_Scarcity_Priming.description: Embeds manufactured urgency markers ('last chance', 'within 48 hours', 'before it disappears') to compress deliberation time and push low-effort endorsement of a framing.

Deepfake_Audio_Speech_Impersonation.description: AI-generated audio impersonating a named official or alliance spokesperson uttering a compromising or alliance-eroding statement, designed to propagate before technical verification is possible.

AI_Generated_Image_Event_Fabrication.description: Photorealistic AI-generated image depicting a fabricated event (border incident, protest, military positioning) posted with urgent framing, exploiting the 'photo = proof' heuristic.

LLM_Chatbot_Personalized_Persuasion.description: A conversational agent engages the target with profile-adaptive argumentation across multiple turns, probing objections and tailoring counter-arguments in real time to nudge opinion toward a pre-defined policy stance.
